note: B1: best threshold (numeric, from the grid). B2: selection criterion (MCR-based). B3: comparative justification of two threshold candidates. B4: MCR formula (deterministic). B5: evaluation of Pia's statement. The visual circle task is not text-extractable.

WS4_B1.note: Accept any midpoint threshold that yields minimum MCR. Multiple valid answers are possible if several thresholds tie.
WS4_B1.example_answer: 10 (veya MCR en düşük olan herhangi bir eşik)

components.idea: references MCR or error rate as the criterion
states the goal is to minimize it (en düşük, en az hata)

WS4_B2.example_answer: MCR değeri en düşük olan eşiği seçerim.

components.idea: mentions two specific MCR values or threshold candidates
concludes which is better and why

WS4_B3.example_answer: Eşik 10'da MCR 0.20, eşik 8'de MCR 0.30 olduğu için 10 daha iyi.

components.idea: confirms Pia is correct / agrees with the statement
explains why: minimum MCR means minimum errors (en az hata)

WS4_B5.example_answer: Pia haklı; en düşük MCR en az hata anlamına gelir.
